title: Cyclone alert – coastal districts
action: Activate SDRF; coordinate with IMD; pre-position relief.

title: Communal tension flag
action: Brief DGP; deploy peace committee; verified communique.

title: Dengue case spike
action: Reinforce staffing; activate Makkalai Thedi Maruthuvam.

title: Water shortage escalation
action: Deploy mobile water tankers; brief District Collector immediately.

title: Crop damage due to unseasonal rain
action: Initiate preliminary damage assessment via Revenue Department.

title: School roof collapse incident (No casualties)
action: Order structural audit of all nearby government schools.
